description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with three main floors and a flat, light brown tiled roof. The front facade is characterized by large glass windows and sliding doors, each leading to private balconies with metal railings. The ground floor includes a main entrance with a blue-tinted glass door and additional windows, while the upper floors are set back slightly, creating spacious terraces. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and beige, with the beige section covering the lower portion of the building. The rear and side views reveal additional terraces and a simple, clean wall structure with minimal ornamentation. The building is equipped with multiple chimneys and a central vertical glass panel that provides natural light to the stairwell or common area.
description: A modern, three-story apartment building with large balconies, glass windows, and a flat tiled roof, finished in white and beige tones.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large glass windows, and multiple balconies with metal railings.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the building's stepped terraces and the simple, unadorned white wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays additional terraces, a beige lower facade, and several windows and doors.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing stepped terraces and a plain white wall with roof details.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with each floor featuring evenly spaced, large glass panels and sliding doors aligned with the balconies.
